n: A Fern By Any Other Name....

steps.t: The bouquet is in a vase near the wrong door on the Scholar's Stair in Bree. Avery Crabapple has asked you to collect the bouquet from the wrong addre…
The neighbours are upon the Scholar's Stair in Bree. Avery Crabapple asked you to inquire of the neighbours for her address.
Fern Coppersmith's sweets are in the alley behind Avery Crabapple. Fern Coppersmith asked you to collect her sweets from the wrong door.
Avery Crabapple is in the Bree Market. You should bring the sweets to Avery Crabapple.
